commit_scope: Record the bounded Postgres storage-port host-carrier receipt and move the carrier north star past the Postgres boundary proof.

local_validation.notes: storage-port-carriers-test.sh self-provisioned throwaway Postgres and returned `verdict: 111111`; memory, segmented file, and Postgres storage carriers agreed on the same storage-test verdict.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this host-carrier receipt slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The existing bounded Postgres storage-port proof is now recorded as the host-carrier receipt: one carrier-agnostic storage-test returned the identical verdict through memory, segmented file, and throwaway Postgres.
public_endpoints: n/a: local throwaway Postgres host-carrier proof

phase_gate.gate: Postgres storage-port carrier must prove the same bounded storage-test verdict as memory and segmented file through throwaway Postgres.
phase_gate.next: Broader source-scan recipes can build on the admitted scan_run/file_mtime floor.
